name: Dijon Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Remove all visible fat from the pork chops.
3. Spray a 13x9x2-inch baking pan with cooking spray.
4. Place bread crumbs in a shallow dish.
5. In another shallow dish, combine Dijon mustard and lemon juice; mix well.
6. Dip both sides of each pork chop into the mustard mixture, then coat with bread crumbs.
7. Place the chops in the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until the pork is no longer pink, turning halfway through baking.
